title: Kallaperambur Lake Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Kallaperambur Lake Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Kallaperambur Lake Bird Sanctuary, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Kallaperambur Lake Bird Sanctuary is a protected area and bird sanctuary located in Thanjavur of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Kallaperambur Lake Bird Sanctuary is a protected area and bird sanctuary located in Thanjavur of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The sanctuary covers an area of 0.64 km2 (0.25 sq mi) and was notified in 2015.

topPlaces.name: Kalvirayampettai
topPlaces.description: Kalvirayanpettai is a village in the Thanjavur taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Allur, Thanjavur
topPlaces.description: Allur is a village in Thiruvaiyaru block, Thanjavur district in Tamil Nadu state, India. It is one of the 49 villages in the Thiruvaiyaru block.

topPlaces.name: Ammaiyagaram
topPlaces.description: Ammaiyagaram is a village in the Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is situated in the Kaveri delta region.

topPlaces.name: Budalur
topPlaces.description: Budalur (pronounced as 'boodhaloor') is a Town and Taluk in Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu. There is a famous historic Shiva temple known as the Abathsagayeshwarar Temple situated in Budalur, built by Great Emperor Raja Raja Cholan (who built the Big temple in Thanjavur) during 10th century.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kallaperambur Lake Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kallaperambur Lake Bird Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kallaperambur Lake Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (35 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (37 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kallaperambur Lake Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kallaperambur Lake Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kallaperambur Lake Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Kallaperambur Lake Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kallaperambur Lake Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kalvirayampettai, Allur, Thanjavur, Ammaiyagaram, Budalur, Maraneri.
